title: Styled Stone Barrels
description: Have you ever wished that barrels came in all of the stone variants? Well, this datapack does exactly that!
body:
# Styled Stone Barrels
Have you ever wished that barrels came in all of the stone variants? Well, this datapack does exactly that!

This is an extension of my other datapack called "Styled Barrels". I felt that this datapack needed to be separate because it didnt feel very vanilla, because you mine the stone barrels with an axe, and that doesn't make any sense.

### What this datapack adds
- Stone Barrel (Block)
- Andesite Barrel (Block)
- Granite Barrel (Block)
- Diorite Barrel (Block)
- Deepslate Barrel (Block)
